entry.title: SAP Cloud Integration – Getting started with Google Pub/Sub Adapter
entry.content:
Google Pub/Sub is a reliable messaging tool that lets your systems talk to each other securely using 'topics.' It’s great for sharing data in real-time across different cloud platforms. With the Google Pub/Sub adapter in SAP CPI, you can easily send or receive messages, making it much simpler to connect your SAP processes with Google Cloud 

The Google Pub/Sub Adapter is available in both sender and receiver modes to streamline message-based workflows and comes in two variants — REST and gRPC. 

Key Features 

  • Publish single messages (Basic) or multiple messages (Advanced) at once. 
  • Use gRPC for real-time performance or REST for polling at defined intervals. 
  • Google Pub/Sub accepts only Base64-encoded data, and the adapter can handle encoding automatically. 
  • Provides multiple post-processing options: Acknowledge after Successful Processing, Acknowledge Immediately, and Do not Acknowledge.  
  • Supports Authentication via OAuth2 service account authentication and Workload Identity Federation.  

Practical Use Case Walkthrough 
 
In this section, we will demonstrate how to send SalesOrder data to a topic using the Google Pub/Sub Receiver adapter and then read the message again with the Google Pub/Sub Sender adapter, using the REST protocol for messaging. 

Publish a Message using Google PubSub Receiver Adapter 

Prepare Payload in Content Modifier  
 
For the demonstration, we hardcode the SalesOrder data into the message body. In real time, you can dynamically store the payload from the source system. 

Configure the Google Pub/Sub Receiver Adapter 

Connection tab: 

Parameter  

Description  

Address  

Specify the hostname to connect Google Pub/Sub. 

Authentication Type  

Select the method for authentication to Google Pub/Sub. 

  • OAuth2 Service Account 
  • Workload Identity Federation  

OAuth2 Token URL  

Specify the OAuth2 Token URL which identifies as the authorization server for producing a JWT token internally.  

Client Email  

Specify Google Service Account Client Email. 

Private Key Alias  

Specify the Google Service Account Private Key for authentication.  

Scope  

Specify the scope of the connection to Google Pub/Sub service. 

Reuse Connection  

Enable the reuse of connection objects from the internal connection pool which in turn improves the network turnaround time for multiple communications to the same end point. 

Connection Timeout (in ms)  

Specify the maximum waiting time (in milliseconds) for the connection to be established with Google Pub/Sub service.  

Response Timeout (in ms)  

Specify the maximum waiting time (in milliseconds) for a response message to be received with Google Pub/Sub service.   

Publish Message using Google Pub/Sub Adapter 

Now let’s navigate to the Processing tab, select the Entity as Topic, and select the operation as Publish Message for the use case. 

Also, provide the project ID and topic ID created on the Google Pub/Sub server. 

Processing Tab: 

Parameter 

Description 

Entity  

Select the entity for message processing:  

  • Topics 
  • Subscriptions  

Operation  

Select the operation to be performed.  

  • Publish Message
  • List  

Project ID  

Specify the Google Pub/Sub project ID.  

Topic ID  

Specify the Topic ID created on Google Pub/Sub service 

Operation Type  

Select the type of operation  

  • Basic 
  • Advanced  

Encode Data  

Select the checkbox to encode data to Base64 

Ordering key  

Specify the ordering key for this message.   

Message Attributes  

Specify multiple message attributes as key value pairs. 

Once you run the iflow, you can see the message processed successfully. 

In addition, you can see that the Sales Order message was successfully published to the Google Pub/Sub service. 

Read a Message using Google Pub/Sub Sender Adapter 

The Google Pub/Sub Sender Adapter is available in gRPC and REST formats. For this demonstration, we're using the REST variant. 

Processing Tab: 

In the Google Pub/Sub Sender Adapter, provide the Subscription ID and Project ID from which the message will be read on the Google Pub/Sub Server.  

You can also select the post-processing action once the message has been polled from the Google Pub/Sub Server. 

Once the iflow is successfully deployed, we can check it in the monitoring page. In response, we can see the message body. 

Conclusion: 

The Google Pub/Sub adapter in SAP CPI brings integrations to life by allowing real-time, event-driven communication between SAP and Google Cloud. It enables CPI to easily publish and receive messages at scale, making integrations faster, more responsive, and loosely linked. The adapter's cloud-native design enables the creation of modern, durable integrations that can quickly change with business needs. 

Quick Links: 

  • For information about Google Pub/Sub Sender adapter configuration, see  SAP Help | Google Pub/Sub Sender Adapter.  
  • For information about Google Pub/Sub Receiver adapter configuration, see  SAP Help | Google Pub/Sub Receiver Adapter.  
  • For detailed information about the Google Pub/Sub adapter, see Google Pub/Sub Adapter Guide 

The next blog will take this further with an exciting new use case — so stay tuned for more insights and updates!

entry.title: SAP Inside Track Paraguay 2025: AXIGMA impulsa el talento local
entry.content:
El pasado 8 de noviembre de 2025, Ciudad del Este fue sede del primer SAP Inside Track en Paraguay, un evento que marcó un hito en la historia de nuestra comunidad tecnológica. Más de 100 profesionales SAP se dieron cita para compartir experiencias, aprender y construir redes profesionales que perdurarán en el tiempo.

La Formación: La Clave del Crecimiento Profesional
En el ecosistema SAP, la capacitación oficial es uno de los activos más valiosos que un profesional puede adquirir. Obtener formación estructurada, con contenido actualizado y respaldada por partners certificados, abre puertas a nuevas oportunidades laborales y permite dominar las tecnologías más demandadas del mercado. Es una inversión en el futuro profesional que marca la diferencia entre tener conocimientos básicos y convertirse en un especialista reconocido.

AXIGMA: Apostando por el Talento Paraguayo
Queremos expresar nuestro profundo agradecimiento a AXIGMA, quien como auspiciante oficial del SAP Inside Track Paraguay 2025, demostró su compromiso con el desarrollo del talento local de una manera excepcional.
AXIGMA puso a disposición de nuestra comunidad 2 cursos completos de capacitación oficial SAP, cada uno con 100 horas de formación intensiva en tecnologías S/4HANA:

  • Formación del Programa SAP MM - Material Management en S/4 HANA
  • Formación del Programa SAP FI - Finanzas en S/4 HANA

Este tipo de formación representa una oportunidad invaluable para profesionales que buscan certificarse en los módulos más solicitados del mercado. No es solo un curso: es una puerta de entrada al siguiente nivel profesional, con contenido oficial, instructores especializados y certificación reconocida internacionalmente.

¡Anunciamos a los Ganadores!
Tras el sorteo realizado durante el evento, nos complace enormemente anunciar a los dos afortunados ganadores que tendrán acceso a esta formación de alto nivel:

🎓 Pablo Gamarra - Ganador de la Capacitación Oficial SAP MM Material Management en S/4HANA


🎓 Agustín Pastrana - Ganador de la Capacitación Oficial SAP FI Finanzas en S/4HANA


¡Felicitaciones a ambos! Les deseamos mucho éxito en su proceso de capacitación. Estamos seguros de que aprovecharán al máximo esta oportunidad y que los conocimientos adquiridos impulsarán sus carreras hacia nuevos horizontes.

¿Quieres Ser el Próximo Ganador?
El próximo año podrías ser tú quien gane premios como estos. Formación de primer nivel, acceso a contenido exclusivo, oportunidades de networking con profesionales destacados y la posibilidad de participar en sorteos con premios que pueden transformar tu carrera profesional.
Mantente conectado con nuestros canales oficiales y únete a la SAP Community Group para no perderte ninguna novedad sobre el próximo evento.

Gracias a Toda la Comunidad
Desde el equipo organizador, queremos agradecer a todos los que hicieron posible este sueño: participantes, speakers, voluntarios y especialmente a nuestros sponsors, que con su apoyo hacen posible que nuestra comunidad siga creciendo.

Esto es solo el comienzo. ¡Nos vemos en el próximo SAP Inside Track Paraguay!

¿Quieres conocer más sobre capacitaciones SAP? Visita www.axigma.com

entry.title: Від ритейлу до енергетики: як український бізнес отримує міжнародне визнання
entry.content:
Українські компанії з різних галузей — енергетики, ритейлу, промисловості та ІТ-консалтингу — здобули перемоги на SAP Quality Awards 2025 у регіоні Центральної та Східної Європи. Проєкти були відзначені за швидкість впровадження новітніх технологій, інноваційність і відчутний бізнес-ефект. Це підтверджує, що український бізнес не лише зберігає операційну стійкість, а й задає стандарти цифрової трансформації на регіональному рівні.

У 2025 році журі SAP Quality Awards відзначило одразу кілька проєктів з України, які продемонстрували різні підходи до трансформації — від cloud-впроваджень і мобільних рішень до HR-та ритейл-інновацій.

Швидкість і cloud-first — Business Evolution

Компанія Business Evolution реалізувала SAP Cloud ERP лише за 4 місяці, використовуючи підхід Fit-to-Standard і стандартний функціонал SAP. Проєкт отримав нагороду Rapid Time to Value.

Результати після запуску:

  • закриття місяця — 4 робочі дні;
  • автоматизація 80% обробки рахунків;
  • зменшення навантаження на фінансову команду до 30%;
  • повна відмова від власної інфраструктури завдяки cloud-моделі.

 Більше інформації за посиланням.

Мобільність і критична інфраструктура — Оператор ГТС України

ТОВ «Оператор ГТС України» отримав нагороду в категорії Business Transformation – Enterprise Solutions, а також спеціальну відзнаку SAP Quality Director Award.

Мобільний застосунок на базі SAP BTP:

  • повністю замінив паперові процеси;
  • працює офлайн;
  • скоротив поїздки між об’єктами та офісами на 40%;
  • зменшив час обробки даних на 40%.

Рішення вже використовують понад 350 фахівців, і проєкт масштабують далі.

Більше інформації за посиланням.

HR як стратегічний інструмент — Метінвест

Група Метінвест була відзначена за трансформацію HR-процесів через масштабування SAP SuccessFactors на підприємстві «Каметсталь». Проєкт здобув перемогу в категорії Business Transformation – Functional Transformation.

Ключові ефекти:

  • у 5 разів скорочено час оцінювання;
  • у 2,5 раза зменшено витрати на ручну обробку;
  • усунено суб’єктивізм в оцінці персоналу;
  • сформовано культуру регулярного зворотного зв’язку.

Більше інформації за посиланням.

Масштаб у ритейлі — NOVUS

Один із найбільших ритейлерів країни — NOVUS — впровадив SAP Merchandising and Inventory Management у 96 магазинах по всій Україні та здобув перемогу в категорії «Business Transformation – Enterprise Solutions»

Результати:

  • робота з даними в режимі реального часу;
  • удвічі швидша генерація замовлень;
  • зменшення втрат продажів через порожні полиці;
  • відмова від додаткових систем і зниження ІТ-витрат.

 Більше інформації за посиланням.

«Перемоги українських компаній на SAP Quality Awards 2025 демонструють, що навіть у складних умовах бізнес в Україні інвестує в ефективність, інновації та довгостроковий розвиток. Ці проєкти стали прикладом того, як технології допомагають не лише оптимізувати процеси, а й підтримувати економічну стабільність країни». — зазначила Ганна Мікулицька, керівна директорка SAP Ukraine.

SAP Quality Awards — це щорічна міжнародна винагорода, яка відзначає найкращі проєкти впровадження SAP за інноваційність, дотримання принципів якості та вимірювану бізнес-цінність. Цього року премія SAP Quality Awards була представлена у трьох основних категоріях: «Business Transformation – Enterprise Solutions», «Business Transformation – Functional Transformation» та «Rapid Time to Value».

Довідка про компанію

У 2025 році компанія відзначала 30 років діяльності на українському ринку. Сьогодні близько 200 українських організацій, зокрема державні установи, а також підприємства нафтогазового, енергетичного, металургійного, фармацевтичного секторів, сфери торгівлі та професійних послуг, використовують рішення SAP. В Україні існує мережа висококваліфікованих партнерів SAP, які надають свої послуги. Компанія активно допомагає українському бізнесу та благодійним фондам, які підтримують постраждалих від війни громадян. Детальніше про розвиток SAP в Україні — на сторінці, присвяченій ювілею компанії. Ознайомитися можна за посиланням. Більше детальної інформації про компанію SAP та її рішення можна отримати на сайті: www.sap.ua.

entry.title: SAP Community Hobbies Series : My Terrace Garden
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

My name is Sumaiya, and I joined SAP in 2015 as a Scholar and since then have worked in different areas and roles.

Today, I’d love to share a little about my hobby as part of the SAP Community Hobbies series 🌱

What began as a simple interest is now a green space with over 300 plants, including fruit plants, vegetables, ornamental plants, succulents, and cactus. It is my space to slow down, reconnect, and find joy beyond screens and schedules.

Aerial view of my terrace garden

 Once an empty wall, now a layered story of vines, foliage, and flowers growing together.

Succulent Mini garden

 

 

How and when did I start this hobby?

During the COVID period, when we were home most of the time, that old familiarity returned. My husband and I started with just a few plants on our terrace—nothing ambitious. But slowly, one plant became many. Caring for them became part of our daily life, bringing calm, purpose, and continuity in an uncertain time.

Looking back, gardening taught me patience long before I recognized it as a lesson. You cannot rush a seedling or force a fruit to ripen—it grows in its own time, as long as you show up consistently.

Started with Few Palm plants and Jasmine

 

What does my garden look like today?

Our home garden includes fruit plants like pomegranate, chickoo, mango, rose apple, sweet lime, star fruit, mulberry, figs, guava and lemon;

vegetable plants such as curry leaves, Drumstick, chillies, beans, tapioca, sweet potato, coriander;

along with ornamental plants, succulents, and cactus.

We may get just 3–4 mangoes in a season, but the joy has never been about the numbers.

Sapodilla, Figs, Green Pepper (Which post drying in sunlight is used as Black Pepper)

 

French Beans, Mangoes, Pomegranate, Rose Apple and Drumstick (Moringa Plant)

The Bright Colors in the green garden

 

What do I love most about it?

The biggest reward is the experience.

Seeing a plant every day, watching it grow slowly, noticing the first bud, and waiting eagerly for it to ripen—it creates a kind of happiness that’s hard to explain. When your own plant finally bears fruit, it feels like a quiet celebration.

I truly enjoy showing my plants to others. Sharing that space gives me deep, immense happiness and a sense of gratitude for small, everyday wins.

Colorful Blooms that makes the day even brighter

 

Challenges and how I deal with them

Gardening isn’t always easy. Some plants don’t survive. Some seasons don’t cooperate. And because our plants are on an open terrace, weeds have been one of the biggest challenges. Most weekends are spent patiently removing them, making sure they don’t overpower the plants we’ve worked so hard to nurture.

Another persistent challenge is mealy bugs—they require constant attention and effort to control. Since we strongly believe in keeping our garden as natural as possible, we avoid chemical solutions. Instead, we rely on organic remedies, using neem oil and turmeric, which may take more time but align with how we want to care for our plants.

Each challenge has taught me to observe more closely, adapt quickly, and accept that not everything is within my control. Every setback becomes a lesson—for the next plant, the next season.

A proud moment

My proud moments are not big milestones. They are simple, quiet ones:

the first fruit on a plant I nurtured from the beginning,

a plant that survived when I truly thought it wouldn’t,

and a harvest that felt earned, not measured.

One plant I will always remember is a snake plant I gifted myself on my birthday during the lockdown. It arrived in a tiny 3–4 inch pot. As it grew, I repotted it into a larger one, and soon I noticed new plants appearing around it. I separated them into individual pots—and the cycle kept repeating. Today, I have over 30–40 snake plants, and I can no longer tell which one was the very first. Somehow, that makes me smile even more.

Propagating from one single snake plant into so many that covered my walking passage, truly this plant amazes me!

 

As our plants grew, they also became homes for life beyond us. We’ve had bulbul birds visit our terrace frequently, building nests among the plants. Over the past two years, they built nests three times and laid eggs. Watching those eggs hatch and seeing tiny baby birds grow was incredibly heartwarming—it felt like our garden had become a safe space not just for plants, but for living beings too.

BulBul Birds looking for a spot to make a nest

 

 

Bulbul bird nest with 2 eggs hatched

 

More recently, we noticed birds slowly discovering our garden. We began placing bird food, and with time, the number of visitors kept increasing. One evening, we heard the most beautiful chorus of birds and stepped out onto the terrace to witness a magical sight—over 20 Munia birds gathered together, calmly enjoying the space. It was a moment of pure joy and gratitude.

Bird Food we placed thinking Bulbul birds will stay in terrace permanently, but something different happened. Looks like this bird food, Munia bird likes more

 

What makes me most proud is seeing this love for plants extend beyond me. My kids often join us while watering the plants, and my 7-year-old daughter especially looks forward to fruit-harvesting days—those moments turn the garden into shared joy and lasting memories.

These experiences remind me that when you show up consistently and care deeply, growth happens—sometimes quietly, sometimes in ways you never expected.

Tools and resources for beginners  and Tips for getting started

If you are completely new to gardening and worried about plants dying, I always recommend starting simple and stress-free.

A great place to begin is with succulents, especially Mother of Millions. Succulents are incredibly forgiving. You can pluck just one leaf, and it will grow into a new plant. With Mother of Millions, it’s even more fascinating—a single leaf can grow into 10–15 new plants. It requires very little care: moist soil and watering on alternate days, or even once every 2–3 days, works just fine.

Plant : Mother Of Millions

 

Another easy and joyful way to start is by regrowing vegetables in water. Take a small portion of used vegetables, place it in a bottle or container with water, and keep it in indirect sunlight. You’ll be surprised at how quickly new growth appears. A small piece of ginger or sweet potato can grow into a healthy plant with fresh leaves. Even a partly used onion placed in water can turn into fresh spring onions—perfect for a quick salad.

In the Kitchen when i see even a small possibility that the vegetables are sprouting, then instead of cooking them, i put in water bottle to help it grow and then repot in some pot and this cycle repeats

 

Many plants don’t even need soil to begin with. Simply place them in a bottle of water and change the water once a week. It’s minimal effort with maximum joy.

Easiest way to grow plans with minimum effort.

 

You don’t need a big space or expensive tools to start gardening. All it really takes is curiosity, patience, and a little care—and the confidence grows along with the plants 🌱

How I keep improving

Over the years, I’ve learned that not every plant needs the same kind of care. Some grow easily with minimal effort, while others demand time, attention, and patience. Understanding this difference has been one of the most valuable lessons gardening has taught me.

With time, confidence grows—and so does curiosity. I’ve become more comfortable trying new plants and new challenges, learning through experience rather than perfection. Each season adds a little more awareness, a little more patience.

Growth doesn’t always need rigid structure. Sometimes, it simply needs time, consistency, and care.

 

The connection to the SAP world

The connection is stronger than it appears.

Gardening is about systems thinking—understanding dependencies like soil, water, sunlight, and timing. You can’t optimize one part and ignore the rest.

In SAP projects, we build solutions that must be sustainable, balanced, and human-centric. Gardening reminds me that real success comes from nurturing systems patiently, not forcing outcomes.

It helps me show up at work more grounded, focused, and calm.

 

 

What’s next? There’s no finish line here—just more learning, more plants, and more quiet joy. I look forward to continuing this journey, one leaf, one flower, and one fruit at a time.

Thank you for reading. If gardening resonates with you—or if you’re curious about how to start, what to grow, or how to nurture plants at home—I’d be happy to connect and have a chat 🌿

And if you have a hobby that helps you slow down, disconnect, or think better, I’d love to hear about it.

entry.title: SAP Community Voice: SAP Joule for Developers, Hobbies Series and Upcoming Events!
entry.content:
We’re happy to bring you another edition filled with highlights, stories, and updates from across our global SAP Community.

There is so much happening right now: from innovative blog posts and hands-on technical content to inspiring personal stories and exciting upcoming events around the world!

In this edition, we explore practical resources to support your SAP BW to SAP Datasphere journey, dive into AI-enabled development with ABAP and Joule, discover a beautiful story from our Hobbies Series, and of course, share important community news and events you won’t want to miss.

Let’s dive in! 

Featured Blog Posts 

Support with functionalities from SAP BW system to SAP Datasphere 

With the end of SAP BW approaching, many companies and developers are diving into SAP Datasphere to migrate reports and build new solutions. In this blog post, based on hands-on implementation experience, SAP member Christian Gravesen, focuses on one specific gap: the absence of standard BW exit variables like Current Month and Current Year in Datasphere. He presents a ready-to-install package that recreates these calendar variables, complete with GitHub access and clear installation guidance. This is a practical resource for anyone working on BW migrations or developing analytical models in SAP Datasphere. 

Read Christian Gravesen blog post here 

AI Enabled Application with ABAP AI SDK powered by ISLM 

As AI becomes a core part of application development, SAP Joule for Developers introduces AI-driven capabilities directly into the ABAP world. In this blog post, SAP´s  Swathy explains how to move beyond traditional transactional scenarios by using the ABAP AI SDK powered by Intelligent Scenario Lifecycle Management (ISLM) to build AI-enabled applications. Through her example (generating a travel itinerary and budget breakdown using generative AI), she walks through the supported products, architecture, and key implementation steps. The ABAP AI SDK powered by ISLM is available in SAP BTP ABAP; SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition and Cloud Private Edition. Additionally, if you want to keep updated about ABAP AI, there is a list of blog posts thread that you can subscribe to. 

Read Swathy blog post here 

SAP Joule Skill in SAP EHSM- Incident Management and more 

Since the beginning of this year, SAP community member Pardhasaradhi started posting great content about his SAP Joule learning and execution journey. One of his recent blog posts about SAP Joule Skill in SAP EHSM-Incident Management, he gives details about low-code and even no-code setup using OData Service. From understanding Joule capability types to configuring, deploying, and testing a custom skill, the blog provides a clear, practical guide for enabling conversational, AI-driven incident reporting in an enterprise environment. And because he is a highly active member on blogging, we highly recommend following his latest posts to keep learning about SAP Joule Skills in Asset Management Space and more! 

Read Pardhasaradhi Reddy Chelikam blog post here 

Automated Predictive Library (APL) Forecast in a Seamless Planning Model 

SAP´s Max Gander and Marc Daniau recently published a very complete guide on how predictive forecasts built with SAP HANA’s Automated Predictive Library (APL) can be integrated into a seamless planning model. They explained that now with SAP Business Data Cloud and seamless planning, data scientists can now leverage HANA’s Predictive Analysis Library (PAL) and Automated Predictive Library (APL) directly on the HANA database of SAP Datasphere and nicely integrate the results into planning processes. In the step-by-step guide, it is possible to visualize the full architecture, from building the forecast directly in HANA, orchestrating it via task chains in SAP Datasphere, and finally consuming the results as a live version in SAP Analytics Cloud. In the end, they recommend more useful content published in SAP Community. This is a definitely must-read. 

Read Max Gander and Marc Daniau blog post here 

Community News 

Don´t forget, we are still waiting for your feedback!  

In the last Community Voice edition, we explained details about our 2026 SAP Community open survey. For more details, please check Mynyna´s Blog Post here, but we would like to remind everyone that there is still time to participate and give your opinion. The survey takes just a few minutes of your time and can be completed from your smartphone or computer. Once the survey concludes, we will carefully analyze the results and share a report summary with you.  If you share the survey link / QR-Code in your social media and comment on the blog post with a link to your post that shows how you helped spread the word, you are automatically participating into a draw to win a virtual meet & greet with Josh Bentley, head of SAP Community! 

Click here to participate on the survey  

Hobbies Series: Terrace Gardening  

SAP’s Sumaiya recently shared her journey into gardening in the SAP Community Hobbies Series. A hobby that began simply and grew into a thriving terrace garden with over 300 plants, including fruits, vegetables, succulents, and ornamental species. She describes how gardening became a way to slow down, reconnect, and find balance beyond screens and schedules. Through her story, Sumaiya reflects on the lessons gardening has taught her, from patience and consistency to embracing challenges like weeds and pests with natural, sustainable solutions. In the end, she concludes with a parallel between gardening and the SAP world, highlighting how gardening reminds us that real success comes from nurturing systems patiently, not forcing outcomes, which helps her show up at work more grounded, focused, and calm. Besides the beautiful pictures she shared of her flowers, we were more than delighted to learn how this hobby has had such an impact on her life. 

Read Sumaiya blog post here 

Events 

Upcoming SAP CodeJam´s  

This year events have officially started, and one of the greatest opportunities to have a hands-on learning experience is definitely through an SAP CodeJam. Around the world, our Developers team gives their best to bring their expertise and share useful tips on various SAP topics. Check bellow the list of the upcoming SAP CodeJam for the next 2 weeks:  

  • Milan, Italy - Joule Studio: Create Joule Skills and Agents ... - SAP Community 
  • Sydney, Austrakua -  Joule Studio: Create Skills and Agents to Ext... - SAP Community 
  • Pune, India - Getting started with Generative AI Hub on SAP... - SAP Community 
  • Heidelberg. Germany - SAP Build: Create Event-Based Processes (Heid... - SAP Community 
  • Pune, India - Build AI services using the CAP and Generativ... - SAP Community 
  • Paris, France - Joule Studio: Create Joule Skills and Agents ... - SAP Community 
  • Melbourne, Australia - Joule Studio: Create Skills and Agents to Exte... - SAP Community 
  • Brisbane, Australia - Gen AI Hub & Joule Studio : Create Skills and... - SAP Community 
  • Paris, France - Real-time data for AI agents: Grounding with ... - SAP Community 

SAP Inside Track Joinville 2026 

Are you part of the Joinville community group? Or maybe you live nearby? One of the biggest events of the year is coming up: SAP Inside Track Joinville 2026! You can expect high-level sessions on innovation, technology, and SAP trends, opportunities to exchange experiences with other community experts, and qualified networking with companies and professionals from the region. The event will take place on March 14 at Ágora Tech Park, Joinville. Make sure to secure your spot and get your tickets through sympla. And follow the Joinville Group to have access to all the updates and news! 

Read more details in Juliane Schmitzhaus blog post here

entry.title: Willkommen!
entry.content:
Herzlich willkommen an alle Interessierten aus dem Raum Basel (CH), aus der Region Freiburg (DE) und natürlich auch aus dem schönen Elsass!

Wir möchten einen offenen, ungezwungenen SAP-Stammtisch aufbauen und laden Entwickler, Berater und Nutzer ein, sich regelmässig mit uns zu treffen – abwechselnd in Basel und in Freiburg. Im Mittelpunkt steht der lockere Austausch rund um SAP: miteinander ins Gespräch kommen, Fragen stellen, Erfahrungen teilen, voneinander lernen und sich vernetzen.

Ob ihr etwas essen möchtet oder einfach nur auf ein Getränk vorbeikommt, bleibt ganz euch überlassen. Wichtig ist uns eine entspannte Atmosphäre, in der sich jede und jeder wohlfühlt. Kommt vorbei, bringt gerne weitere Interessierte mit und gestaltet diesen SAP-Stammtisch gemeinsam mit uns!

Alle, die die Idee des offenen Austauschs und der Zusammenarbeit teilen, sind eingeladen, sich einzubringen, Themen vorzuschlagen oder zukünftige Events mitzugestalten.

Grüsse Marcel und Bastian

entry.title: Der erste Stammtisch Basel - Freiburg
entry.content:
Endlich war es soweit, der erste Stammtisch hat in Basel stattgefunden. In gemütlicher Runde haben wir uns über SAP,  ABAP, Fiori und KI ausgetauscht. Uns kennengelernt und beschlossen, dass auf jeden Fall zu wiederholen 🙂

Der nächste Stammtisch wird in Freiburg stattfinden. Einfach diese Gruppe abonnieren und das Event mitbekommen! Details folgen dann. 

Bastian

entry.title: SAP and the Mercedes-Accelerating Innovation Beyond the Track
entry.content:
SAP is one of the world’s leading enterprise software companies, recognized for its solutions in ERP, data analytics, artificial intelligence and cloud computing. Its partnership with the Mercedes-AMG PETRONAS Formula One Team, one of the most successful teams in Formula 1 history, demonstrates how enterprise technology can drive performance not only on the racetrack, but across the entire organization.

In Formula 1, where milliseconds define winners and regulations are increasingly strict, data, governance and agility have become as critical as engine power and aerodynamics.

1. SAP’s Role Within the Mercedes-AMG PETRONAS F1 Team

SAP is a strategic technology partner to Mercedes-AMG PETRONAS, supporting the team’s digital core and operational backbone.

SAP Cloud ERP and SAP S/4HANA Cloud

These platforms serve as the team’s central digital system, integrating: finance and controlling; procurement and supply chain; inventory and asset management; operational planning and reporting.

With thousands of components per car and extremely tight development cycles, having a single, real-time source of truth is essential.

SAP Business Technology Platform (BTP) and SAP Business AI

Through SAP BTP and embedded AI capabilities, Mercedes is able to build custom applications for racing operations and logistics; automate workflows across departments; use advanced analytics and predictive models for planning and decision-making; connect technical, operational and financial data in a secure cloud environment.

This allows the team to operate with the same precision off the track that it demands on it.

2. Innovation, Information Security and Process Agility

Data-Driven Innovation

Formula 1 teams generate massive volumes of data every race weekend. SAP solutions enable Mercedes to transform this data into actionable insights, supporting:

  • scenario simulations for operational and financial planning;

  • optimization of supply chain and resource allocation;

  • faster reaction to regulatory and competitive changes;

  • continuous innovation within strict cost and time constraints.

Decisions that once relied heavily on experience and intuition are now reinforced by real-time analytics and AI-driven insights.

Information Security in a High-Stakes Environment

In Formula 1, data is intellectual property — and a competitive advantage. SAP cloud solutions provide:

  • robust access control and role-based authorizations;

  • encrypted data storage and secure cloud environments;

  • audit trails and traceability for sensitive financial and operational data;

  • high availability during critical periods such as race weekends.

This level of security protects both strategic racing data and financial information, ensuring trust, compliance and resilience.

Agility becomes a competitive advantage — not just in racing strategy, but in how the entire team operates.

3. Audit, Compliance and Predictive Performance Analytics

Audit and Regulatory Compliance

Since the introduction of the FIA cost cap, financial transparency and auditability have become mission-critical.

SAP enables Mercedes to monitor costs in near real time; ensure full traceability of expenses across development, manufacturing and racing operations; generate audit-ready financial reports aligned with FIA regulations; enforce segregation of duties and internal controls.

This minimizes regulatory risk and allows leadership to make confident decisions based on trusted, auditable data.

Predictive Analytics Applied to Car Performance

Beyond finance, SAP plays a key role in predictive performance analysis. By combining telemetry, historical race data, simulations and operational data, the team can:

  • predict component wear and potential failures;

  • optimize race setups and strategic decisions;

  • anticipate operational and logistical impacts of technical changes;

  • link technical performance with cost and resource implications.

The result is a proactive approach: acting before problems occur, rather than reacting after performance is lost.

4. Mercedes-AMG PETRONAS Drivers and Formula 1 Season 2026

Mercedes Drivers for 2026

For the 2026 Formula 1 season, Mercedes-AMG PETRONAS will be represented by:

  • George Russell

  • Andrea Kimi Antonelli

This driver lineup combines experience with emerging talent, aligned with the team’s long-term performance strategy.

Conclusion: From Formula 1 to the Enterprise World

The partnership between SAP and the Mercedes-AMG PETRONAS Formula One Team proves that success at the highest level depends on more than speed.

Through advanced analytics, predictive intelligence, rigorous auditability, information security and process agility, SAP helps Mercedes compete at the limit — efficiently, securely and within the rules.

If SAP helps accelerate Formula 1, imagine what it can do for your company.

Sources and References

This article is based on information from the following reliable and official sources:

  • SAP Newsroom (Global, Brazil and Portugal) – official announcements and case studies on the SAP–Mercedes partnership

  • SAP SE – documentation on SAP S/4HANA Cloud, SAP BTP, SAP Business AI, analytics and audit capabilities

  • Mercedes-AMG PETRONAS Formula One Team – publicly available information on operations and technology strategy

  • Formula1.com and FIA publications – official regulations, cost cap framework and 2026 calendar details

  • Specialized motorsport media (including CNN Brasil) – confirmation of drivers and team structures for 2026

entry.title: Лютий 2026: як розпочати перетворення, а не лише міграцію
entry.content:
Привіт, SAP Community Kyiv! 

У лютому акцент — не тільки на технологіях, а й на людях, даних та процесах. Ми зібрали для вас найважливіші сесії для користувачів та підтримки: від змін у бізнес‑трансформації та SAP Integration Suite до SAP Business Data Cloud, SAP Analytics Cloud і підтримки через SAP for Me.

Бізнес‑трансформація та зміни

3 лютого, 15:00
The Human Side of Business Transformations: Mastering Organisational Change Management
Перехід на SAP S/4HANA — це не просто технічний апдейт. Дізнайтеся, як ефективно включити команди в зміни, щоб перетворення було зрозумілим, прийнятим і навіть мотивуючим.

17 лютого, 15:00 
Driving Transformation with SAP Business Content & Accelerators
Дивіться, як новий Transformation Domain у Business Accelerator Hub допомагає швидко знаходити best practices, процесні моделі, тест‑скрипти та дашборди для реальних кейсів.

Інтеграції та архітектура

Огляд ключових можливостей SAP Integration Suite, use cases та новин 2026 року: AI‑assisted integration, агентний AI, event‑driven архітектури, prebuilt content і governance.

24 лютого, 17:00 
Architect the Future: Designing AI at Scale: Data & AI Foundation for Custom AI on SAP BTP
Як підготувати, управляти та активувати дані з SAP і не‑SAP систем, щоб створювати кастомні AI‑рішення на SAP BTP.

SAP Integration Suite – Monthly Update February
Оновлення по ключовим функціям, новим релізам та пряма взаємодія з Integration Black Belt / формат #AskAnythingIntegration.

Дані, аналітика та BW‑модернізація

The Smart Path to SAP BW Modernization
Як сучаснити SAP BW‑ландшафт, зберігаючи існуючі звіти, і одночасно переходити до SAP Business Data Cloud. Практичні варіанти шляхів і їхні бізнес‑та технічні trade‑offs.

19 лютого, 17:00 
Empowering SAP Datasphere Users with SAP Business Data Cloud Innovations
Як SAP Business Data Cloud змінює роль SAP Datasphere у загальній архітектурі даних і як це впливає на аналітику та AI.

26 лютого, 17:00 
From Data to Decisions: Analytics with SAP Analytics Cloud and SAP BDC
Як SAP Business Data Cloud і SAP Analytics Cloud працюють разом, щоб забезпечити єдину основу для аналітики, планування та AI‑інсайтів.

Підтримка, SAP for Me та Security

4 лютого, 15:00
Insights into the Extension of Compatibility Packs
Огляд розширеного терміну використання Compatibility Packs до травня 2026 року.

4 лютого, 16:00 
Customer Interaction Center (CIC) Support SAP for Me: Solution Search and Self Service Enablement
Як ефективно шукати відомі проблеми та рішення у всіх базах знань SAP.

5 лютого, 17:00 
Customer Interaction Center (CIC) Support SAP for Me: Getting the Most From Your Support
Як максимально використовувати ресурси підтримки SAP та отримувати найкращий сервіс за своїми підписками.

13 лютого, 17:30

19 лютого, 11:30

23 лютого, 17:30

Інші цікаві події

UKISUG & SAP Customer Support Day – From Insights to Impact (London, onsite)
